title: Delicate Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional Moroccan dish, slow-cooked with chicken, aromatic spices, and dried fruits.

ingredients.name: chicken
ingredients.amount: 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breast or thighs

ingredients.name: mediterranean
ingredients.notes: use a good quality olive oil

instructions: Heat the oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the ginger, cumin, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dates, chicken broth, and cover the tagine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
